use_cases: Binary settings toggles for enabling/disabling features in settings panels
Dark mode or theme switches in application headers
Filter toggles for e-commerce product filtering
Permission or access control toggles in admin dashboards
Form inputs requiring boolean values in healthcare or business applications
ai_summary: A reusable toggle switch component built on Radix UI primitives with Tailwind CSS styling. Supports multiple variants (default, outline) and sizes (lg, md, sm) via class-variance-authority for flexible styling customization. The component features hover states, focus-visible rings for accessibility, and active state styling using accent colors. As a foundational atomic UI primitive, it's designed for integration into larger form systems, settings interfaces, and dashboard components across SaaS, fintech, and general web applications.
